title: ANC - 2b-Change ANC to Off during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: Verify that turning ANC OFF during an active call (with Transparency ON before the call) results in correct post-call ANC/Transparency state restoration across different device families.
steps: Start/join a call (Zoom, Teams, Mobile) — ANC turns ON with previously selected option, Transparency becomes greyed out and turned OFF.
Tap Transparency toggle — popup informs user option is not available during call.
Tap ANC toggle to turn it OFF — ANC is set to OFF with no selected value.
Tap ANC and Transparency toggles — user can switch between ANC and Transparency modes.
expected: After leaving the call: On Emu/Osprey/Tern: ANC stays OFF with no selected value, Transparency becomes accessible again and set to OFF with previously selected value. On Lark/Peregrine: ANC stays OFF with no selected value, Transparency becomes accessible again and set to ON with previously selected value. After step 5, user can switch between ANC and Transparency modes.
